name: @astraler/generate-image-skill
description: Astraler image generation AND editing skill for agent harnesses (Claude Code, Antigravity, Obsidian Agent Client) — multi-provider (Google Gemini/Imagen 4 + OpenAI GPT-image), structured prompt enhancement (7-component for generate, Preserve/Change/Constraint for edit), JSON output contract, multimodal edit via Gemini, optional mask-based inpainting via OpenAI. Distributed via skills CLI (`npx skills add`), not npm registry.
author: Tran Thien
